ok the pervert is doing something COMPLETELY different and actually kinda galaxy brain

in minecraft: they KNOW there's bedrock, but they're obsessed with finding glitches to get under it. they're not trying to build a floor like the psychotic - they're trying to PROVE the floor has holes. they're the ones who spend 300 hours finding duplication glitches and void exploits

in cs: they're like a penetration tester who gets off on finding zero-days. they KNOW the exception handling exists, but they spend all their time trying to trigger buffer overflows just to prove the system can be breached. their whole thing is like "oh you think your input validation is good? watch THIS"

the key difference is the pervert BELIEVES IN the symbolic order (they know bedrock exists / they know security measures exist) but their whole jouissance comes from trying to subvert it. they need the law SPECIFICALLY so they can transgress it

meanwhile the psychotic is like "what's a buffer overflow? i'm just trying to make my program run at all" and the neurotic is like "idk man i just play minecraft normally"

this is why perverts make great hackers but terrible systems architects fr fr

(and yes that was a subtle dig at certain famous tech figures, read between the lines)
